title: High Contrast Extended
description: An extension of the new high contrast pack that Mojang has started to add to the recent snapshots
body:
This resource pack is an extension of the high contrast pack that mojang has started to include in snapshots This pack extends the high contrast to all GUIs as of 1.19.4-pre-2

Note: Dark blocks may be hard to see, I tried to mitigate this by making the actual inventory slots slightly lighter than the surrounding area, but if anyone else has a better way to handle this, feel free to PR it lol

Thank you to the Minecraft Commands Discord for helping me with the text stuff lol

### A bedrock edition port has been made by NSPG911 and can be found [Here](https://modbay.org/textures/753-high-contrast-extended-bedrock-port.html)

Credits:

 -  `the der discohund#8028` on the Minecraft Commands Discord, for the shaders because I would not have been able to figure that out
